requirement_topic.zh: EMC 控制与无线功能分层
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 控制與無線功能分層

summary.en: Power tools with switched-mode power supplies, DC brushless drives, chargers, and communication modules should be assessed under the Thailand route for EMI/EMC and interoperability expectations before market placement. Where wireless radio is present, the telecom path is not automatically covered by electrical safety evidence and must be handled under NBTC scope. Electrical test configurations should reflect Thai 230 V 50 Hz operation and actual intended use environment.
summary.zh: 含开关电源、无刷驱动、电池充电器或通信模块的电动工具，在泰国进入市场前应按泰国路径进行 EMI/EMC 与干扰控制核查。若带无线电功能，其通信路径不应与纯电气安全证据合并处理，而应按 NBTC 规则单独核查。测试条件应反映泰国 230V 50Hz 使用环境。
summary.zht: 含開關電源、無刷驅動、電池充電器或通信模組的電動工具，在泰國進入市場前應按泰國路徑進行 EMI/EMC 與干擾控制核查。若具無線電功能，其通信路徑不應與純電氣安全證據合併處理，而應按 NBTC 規則單獨核查。測試條件應反映泰國 230V 50Hz 使用環境。

standards_or_laws: TISI and Ministry of Industry electrical conformity pathways for in-scope power tools
Model-level EMC assessment aligned to intended Thailand deployment environment
NBTC telecom regime for equipment with intentional wireless radio functions

summary.en: Chinese exports often use GB electrical-noise and EMC-type data with domestic type-approval flow, and these records are valuable for technical comparison. They do not by themselves prove Thai importer suitability or Thailand telecom compliance for cordless radio features.
summary.zh: 中国出口通常提供 GB 电磁或噪声相关数据及国内审批链条，适合作为技术比对，但不能单独证明泰国市场投放或无线功能的 NBTC 合规。
summary.zht: 中國出口通常提供 GB 電磁或雜訊相關資料及國內審批流程，適合作為技術比對，但不能單獨證明泰國市場投放或無線功能的 NBTC 合規。

standards_or_laws: China radio and EMC domestic evidence where model-specific

gap.en: A frequent gap is filing one combined EMC or radio evidence package across all SKUs and assuming it covers both fixed and cordless variants. Exporters should split route mapping for non-radio and radio-enabled models and show Thailand-frequency test assumptions before relying on compliance claims.
gap.zh: 常见差距是对有线和无绳版本使用单一 EMC 或无线证据包并默认覆盖。出口商应按非无线与无线型号分别映射路径，在声明合规前明确泰国电网频率与使用条件。
gap.zht: 常見差距是對有線與無絞版本使用單一 EMC 或無線證據包並默認覆蓋。出口商應按非無線與無線型號分別映射路徑，在聲明合規前明確泰國電網頻率與使用條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Thai review scope requires EMC and wireless-type routing by model. This can be mandatory for specific product configurations, not automatically across all power-tool models.
mandatory_status.cn: China EMC/CCC records are evidence only and do not automatically discharge Thailand model-specific EMC or NBTC checks.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No blanket conclusion should be inferred across SKUs. Confirm EMC and radio routing by exact model and verify that Thai review assumptions match 230 V 50 Hz and installed use-case conditions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应按 SKU 统一推论。需按型号确认 EMC 与无线路径，并核验泰国评审假设与 230V 50Hz 及实际使用场景一致。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應按 SKU 統一推論。需按型號確認 EMC 與無線路徑，並核驗泰國評審假設與 230V 50Hz 及實際使用場景一致。
